title: Greg's Modern Construct
description: Adds GregTech tool materials to Tinker's Construct.
body:
Inspired by [Tinker's Gregworks](https://github.com/Vexatos/TinkersGregworks) & [Greg's Construct](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/gregs-construct).

 

This mod is an addon for [GregTechCEu Modern](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/gregtechceu-modern) & [Tinkers Construct](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tinkers-construct).

 

The mod will automatically grab the ToolProperty from GregTech materials that have it, and create the necessary data to allow it to also be a Tinker's Construct material part. 

 

Also, this mod changes Tinker's Construct smeltery metal recipes to use 144mb to represent 1 ingot worth of material, to match GregTech.

 

Configuration Options:

*   Enable/Disable Smeltery Melting/Casting material parts
*   Enable/Disable Extruder Recipes for material parts
*   Enable/Disable Fluid Solidification Recipes for material parts
*   Ignore generating material data/stats/traits for certain GregTech materials
*   Global modifiers for Head/Limb/Grip/Handle parts
